Container.Name: FlipperBoards
Container.Overview: FlipperBoards is a self-hosted split-flap display simulator and controller. Show clocks, weather, scrolling text, images, and hand-crafted designs on a virtual Vestaboard-style display. Includes a web remote control, a tile-by-tile Screen Designer with icon stamps, image playlist rotation, multi-screen support, and an Android kiosk app. Open-source core with commercial hosting available at https://flipperboards.com.
Container.Description: Self-hosted split-flap (Vestaboard-style) display simulator. Clock, weather, news, custom text, images, screen designer with icon stamps, multi-screen, rotation playlists, web remote, and Android kiosk app.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the FlipperBoards web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the database and uploaded images. All data lives here.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the clock display. Examples: America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo.

Config.Name: OpenWeather API Key
Config.Description: Optional: OpenWeatherMap API key to enable the Weather display mode. Get one free at openweathermap.org.

Config.Name: News API Key
Config.Description: Optional: NewsAPI.org key to enable the News Headlines display mode.

Config.Name: Display Rows
Config.Description: Number of tile rows on the default screen (standard Vestaboard is 6).

Config.Name: Display Columns
Config.Description: Number of tile columns on the default screen (standard Vestaboard is 22).
